language: import java.util.Scanner; class GFG { public static void main(String[] args) { Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in); int x = sc.nextInt(); int y = sc.nextInt(); // code here int p = x+y ; int q = x-y ; int r = x*y ; int s = x/y ; int t = x%y ; // The below code prints the output System.out.println(p + " " + q + " " + r + " " + s + " " + t); } }
